title: PLC 1200 Hardware Error: Power Supply Failure
content: Error Code: 16#8090. This indicates a failure in the 24V DC power supply. Check the power supply unit, wiring, and connections. Ensure the input voltage is within the specified range.

title: PLC 1200 Hardware Error: I/O Module Not Detected
content: Error Code: 16#80C3. The CPU cannot establish communication with a configured I/O module. Verify the module is correctly seated in the rack and powered on. Check for bent pins or damage to the backplane connector.

title: PLC 1200 Software Error: User Program Checksum Error
content: Error Code: 16#D006. The checksum of the user program in the memory does not match the expected value, indicating corruption. Reload the program from your project file.

title: PLC 1200 Software Error: Cycle Time Exceeded
content: Error Code: 16#D080. The program's execution time exceeds the configured maximum cycle time. Optimize complex loops, use timed interrupts for long tasks, or increase the configured cycle time.

title: PLC 1500 Hardware Error: Memory Card Failure
content: Error Code: 16#808B. The CPU cannot read from or write to the SIMATIC memory card. The card may be faulty, write-protected, or formatted incorrectly. Try re-inserting the card or using a new one.

title: PLC 1500 Hardware Error: PROFINET Interface Error
content: Error Code: 16#8101. An error occurred on the PROFINET interface. Check network cables, switch configurations, and ensure the device names are unique and correctly configured in the TIA Portal project.

title: PLC 1500 Software Error: Memory Overflow
content: Error Code: 16#D081. The user program or data is too large for the available load or work memory. Optimize the code, reduce the size of data blocks, or use a CPU with larger memory capacity.

title: PLC 1500 Software Error: Inconsistent Data Block
content: Error Code: 16#D0A3. The structure of a data block in the online project is different from the offline version. This can happen after modifying a DB and downloading only the changes. Re-download the entire block.

title: General: Short Circuit Detected
content: Error Code: 16#80A0. The PLC has detected a short circuit on one of its digital output channels. Identify the faulty output channel and inspect the connected actuator, wiring, and terminals for short circuits.

title: General: System Time Not Synchronized
content: Error Code: 16#D207. The PLC's internal clock is not synchronized with an NTP server or the master controller. Check NTP settings and network connectivity.
